northStar: The Corner Table — a regular's seat, candlelight on worn wood. The site doesn't perform warmth; it exists in it.

colorMeta.narrative: Dark-dominant, single activating accent. Smoke is the ground. Char and Soot layer above. Ember is the one moment of heat — used sparingly, always alone. Crust and Amber form a secondary warm arc for navigation and secondary emphasis. Light values appear only as text or overlays on dark surfaces.

pairings.note: Primary text on dark — heading and body
Maximum contrast — hero and nav text
Secondary warm text on dark surface

typographyMeta.narrative: Two voices with separated roles. Bodoni Moda italic for atmosphere and display. Jost for information — all-caps tracked labels and readable body. The roles never swap.

display.rule: Only on dark surfaces. Never for body text, labels, or CTAs.

shadows.narrative: Warm-tinted, multi-layer. Never cool-grey. Glow over stroke for depth. Ambient shadows use Smoke-tinted rgba; glow layers use Ember or Crust at low opacity.

motion.narrative: Ease-out-expo universally. Slow settle, fast start. No bounce, no elastic, no spring. Spatial transforms: 0.6–0.9s. Color/opacity: 0.25–0.35s. Scroll reveal: 0.75s with stagger.

easing.name: ease-out-expo
easing.usage: All transitions with spatial movement (transforms, perspective, scale)

motion.reducedMotion: Strip all transforms. Retain opacity transitions at 200ms max.

notes.mobile: Stack layout. Hero title uses mobile clamp. Fireplace video hidden. Menu tabs 2-column grid. Gallery 2-column 1:1 grid. FAB visible. Section padding 4rem.
notes.desktop: Fireplace video visible. Gallery multi-column. FAB hidden. Section padding 6rem.

primary-cta.description: Primary call-to-action. Ember red, sharp corners, all-caps Jost. The site's strongest action signal.

ghost-button.description: Secondary action. Transparent with Crust border, Amber text on hover.

menu-tab.description: Menu category tab. Underline indicator on active, never a background fill.

gallery-card.description: Gallery image card with 3D perspective hover. Perspective on parent container.

contact-card.description: Contact info card with warm 3D hover lift.

mobile-fab.description: Fixed mobile call-to-action button. Visible below 768px only.

back-to-top.description: Scroll-to-top button with gold rim glow and backdrop blur.
back-to-top.html:
<button class="back-to-top" aria-label="Zurück nach oben">
  <svg><!-- arrow icon --></svg>
</button>

opening-hours-row.description: Single row in the opening hours table. Rounded, warm-dark background.
